---
title: "DeepSeek — Data Profile"
subtitle: "Catalogo descritivo dos parquets do parser canonico v3"
source-title: "DeepSeek"
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| code-summary: "Setup — paths, conexao DuckDB, helpers"

import sys
from pathlib import Path

_this = Path.cwd()
_project_root = _this if (_this / "src").exists() else _this.parent
sys.path.insert(0, str(_project_root))

import pandas as pd
import duckdb
from itables import init_notebook_mode
init_notebook_mode(all_interactive=False)

from src.parsers.quarto_helpers import (
    fmt_pct, fmt_int, safe_int, show_df, show_md, plotly_bar,
    has_col, has_view, table_count, setup_notebook,
)

SOURCE_KEY     = "deepseek"
SOURCE_TITLE   = "DeepSeek"
SOURCE_COLOR   = "#3B82F6"  # DeepSeek royal blue
MUTED          = "#D1D5DB"
PROCESSED      = _project_root / "data" / "processed" / "DeepSeek"
TABLES         = ["conversations", "messages", "tool_events", "branches"]
AUX_TABLES     = []
ACCOUNT_FILTER = None

con = duckdb.connect()
_setup = setup_notebook(con, SOURCE_KEY, PROCESSED, TABLES, AUX_TABLES, ACCOUNT_FILTER)
```

> **Sobre DeepSeek:** parser v3 cobrindo R1 reasoning (thinking ~31% das
> msgs!), `accumulated_token_usage` (token_count ~98%), branches via int IDs
> (`current_message_id` + `parent_id`), search_results com structure rica,
> `model_type=expert` → mode=research, `status` enum (FINISHED/INCOMPLETE/WIP)
> em finish_reason, files per msg em attachment_names.

{{< include _template.qmd >}}
